name: BunnyEra System Icon Pack
description: AI generation workflow definition for BunnyEra system and product icons.

style.visualStyle: modern dark futuristic app icon, rounded square, clean 3D or vector-like design, neon cyan and emerald accents, premium technology brand style
rules: suitable for app icon and dashboard UI

assets.prompt: Create a BunnyEra Console app icon: dark rounded-square background, futuristic AI dashboard symbol, neon cyan and emerald accents, clean premium technology style, no text.
Create a BunnyEra2FA app icon: dark rounded-square background, glowing shield and lock symbol, neon cyan and emerald accents, secure authenticator style, no text.
Create a BunnyEra AI app icon: dark rounded-square background, glowing neural brain or AI core symbol, neon cyan and emerald accents, futuristic clean style, no text.
Create a BunnyEra Claw app icon: dark rounded-square background, robotic claw or automation engine symbol, neon cyan and emerald accents, powerful execution engine style, no text.
Create a BunnyEra Browser app icon: dark rounded-square background, browser window and cursor automation symbol, neon cyan and emerald accents, AI browser automation style, no text.
Create a BunnyEra Cloud app icon: dark rounded-square background, cloud network symbol, neon cyan and emerald accents, secure cloud technology style, no text.
Create a BunnyEra Security app icon: dark rounded-square background, shield, scan, and protection symbol, neon cyan and emerald accents, cyber security style, no text.
Create a BunnyEra Workflows app icon: dark rounded-square background, connected nodes and automation flow symbol, neon cyan and emerald accents, workflow automation style, no text.
